headline: Williams-Sonoma, Inc. announces release date for fourth quarter and fiscal year 2025 results: Wednesday, March 18th, 2026
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, March 11, 2026--Williams-Sonoma, Inc. (NYSE: WSM) announced today that it will release its fourth quarter and fiscal year 2025 results on Wednesday, March 18th, 2026 before the market opens. Following the release via the wire services, the Company will host a conference call beginning at 10:00 AM Eastern Time, which can be accessed at http://ir.williams-sonomainc.com/events. Following the call, a replay of the webcast will be available at http://ir.williams-sonomainc.com/events be
